hero.kicker: Café by the Balaton pond · Warsaw
hero.title: Coffee, waffles & calm
hero.lede: A small café in Gocław, right on the edge of the Balaton pond. Fresh bakes, craft coffee and a deck that looks out over the water.

about.label: The place
about.title: A quiet shore in the middle of the city
about.paragraph1: Balaton Cafe began with a simple longing — for a slow morning by the water, a good cup of coffee and a warm slice of apple cake. Our café sits on Warsaw's Balaton pond, where the city goes quiet for a while.
about.paragraph2: We bake every day, brew beans roasted locally, and serve waffles whose scent drifts all the way to the deck. In summer you sit by the water; in winter, by the window with a view of the pier.

menu.label: The menu
menu.title: What we serve
menu.intro: A short, seasonal menu. Prices in złoty.
menu.note: Full menu available in the café. Ask about today's special.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.title: A moment by the Balaton
gallery.intro: Frames from the café, the plate and the deck.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Drop us a line
contact.intro: A question about a table, a birthday, or a custom cake order? Leave a message — we'll get back to you.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contact.newsletterText: Seasonal flavours and small events. No spam.

footer.tagline: Coffee, waffles & calm by the water.
